BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"2. I do not expect things to work out for me.","Q2":"2. As I look back, I see a lot of failures.","Q3":"2. I get very little pleasure from the things I used to enjoy.","Q4":"2. I feel quite guilty most of the time.","Q5":"1. I feel I may be punished.","Q6":"2. I am disappointed in myself.","Q7":"2. I criticize myself for all my faults.","Q8":"1. I have thoughts of killing myself, but I would not carry them out.","Q9":"3. I feel like crying, but I can't.","Q10":"3. I am so restless or agitated that I have to keep moving or doing something.","Q11":"3. It's hard to get interested in anything.","Q12":"1. I find it more difficult to make decisions than usual.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"2. I feel more worthless as compared to other people.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"0. I have not experienced any change in my sleeping pattern.","Q17":"1. I am more irritable than usual.","Q18":"2-. My appetite is much less than before.","Q19":"2. It's hard to keep my mind on anything for very long.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"0. I have not noticed any recent changes in my interest in sex."}
